hero.title: Every night is
hero.subtitle: IDILI Live is a global producer, promoter and presenter of extraordinary live experiences — from West End musicals to immersive dining theatre, world-class opera to landmark exhibitions.

productions.title: Mamma Mia! The Party
productions.description: London & Stockholm. An immersive ABBA-themed theatrical dining experience that redefined the genre.

productions.title: Elf The Musical
productions.description: The beloved festive spectacular, staged across the UK & US
productions.long_description:
Son of a Nutracker! Elf The Musical charmed audiences on both sides of the Atlantic last Christmas as it returned to the UK and USA in 2025.

Returning to the West End for a strictly limited Christmas run at the Aldywch Theatre, the London all-star cast included Joel Montague, Carrie Hope Fletcher and Aled Jones MBE as Buddy, Jovie and Walter Hobbs respectively. 

On the other side of the pond, the show undertook a new Sparklejollytwinklejingley tour of North America, taking in 10 cities in 10 weeks.

The 2025 season followed two hugely successful runs in London’s West End in 2022 and 2023, and a record breaking run on Broadway in 2024. Based on the beloved 2003 New Line Cinema hit starring Will Ferrell, this smash-hit musical features a book by Tony Award-winners Thomas Meehan (Annie, The Producers, Hairspray) and Bob Martin (The Drowsy Chaperone), with songs by Tony Award nominees Matthew Sklar and Chad Beguelin (The Wedding Singer).

productions.title: Rent The Musical
productions.description: 20th anniversary UK tour of the famous rock musical
productions.long_description:
A tour of an acclaimed, 20th anniversary revival production of the multi-award-winning rock musical Rent was produced by Idili from 2016 to 2017.

Described as an “exhilarating, landmark rock opera,” Rent returned to the London stage at Victoria’s St James Theatre, telling the thrilling story of a group of impoverished young artists struggling to survive in New York City’s East Village in the thriving days of Bohemian excess. 

Inspired by Puccini’s classic opera La Bohème, Rent features unforgettable music and lyrics by Jonathan Larson including the much-loved songs Seasons of Love, Take Me or Leave Me and La Vie Bohème. Winner of four Tony Awards, six Drama Desk Awards and the prestigious Pulitzer Prize for Drama, it ran on Broadway for an astonishing 5,123 performances during its 12-year run. It is amongst the top 20 highest grossing Broadway musicals ever.

Directed by Bruce Guthrie, Idili’s 20th anniversary production of Rent starred Ross Hunter (We Will Rock You, The Book of Mormon) as Roger Davis, Billy Cullum (Matilda, Charlie and the Chocolate Factory) as Mark Cohen, Ryan O’Gorman (Les Misérables, The Phantom of the Opera) as Tom Collins, Shanay Holmes (Thriller Live, The Bodyguard) as Joanne Jefferson, Layton Williams (Billy Elliot, Thriller Live) as Angel Schunard, Philippa Stefani (In The Heights, High Society) as Mimi Marquez and Lucie Jones (American Psycho, Les Misérables) as Maureen Johnson. Several of the cast members subsequently had feature roles in West End productions and on television shows.

productions.title: ABBA: Super Troupers The Exhibition
productions.description: The official ABBA exhibition, presented in London.
productions.long_description:
IDILI participated in the presentation of ABBA: Super Troupers The Exhibition during its London run at The Southbank Centre in 2017/18, which was extended by popular demand.

The immersive exhibition brought to life the world of chart-topping Swedish pop sensation ABBA (Agnetha Fältskog, Björn Ulvaeus, Benny Andersson, and Anni-Frid Lyngstad) in a visitor experience that charted their music, lyrics, creative process and influence as one of the most iconic pop bands of the modern age.

ABBA: Super Troupers The Exhibition managed to transform the traditional exhibition experience into an insightful take on the group’s story. Incorporating lyrics, costumes, instruments, experiential backdrops of the key events and locations that defined and shaped the band, album artwork, photography, film and more, the exhibition went truly behind-the-scenes to examine the heavy-weight influence of one of the most enduring acts of all time.

productions.title: Cecilia Bartoli
productions.long_description: The mezzo-soprano Cecilia Bartoli is one of the world’s leading classical artists with an outstanding and ongoing stage career that, so far, spans more than 35 years. Her work is inspired by her passion for re-discovering little-known music, and her profound interest in historically-informed performance practice. Her large-scale projects, which embrace various art forms, have brought her international recognition and led to prestigious managerial positions in Salzburg and Monte Carlo.

productions.title: Les Grandes Voix
productions.description: Well-established series featuring world-class operatic stars
productions.long_description:
Established in 1993, Les Grandes Voix began as recitals with singers and piano, then quickly grew and broadened its horizons: more concerts, more partnerships with other venues, more artists from different parts of the world, a wider repertoire spanning from baroque to Bel Canto and chamber music.

Regarded as a leading and benchmark series for operatic concerts in the French and European musical landscape, Les Grandes Voix has contributed to the artistic recognition in France of major artists such as Benjamin Bernheim, Roberto Alagna, Juan Diego Flórez, Cecilia Bartoli, Anna Netrebko, Joyce DiDonato, Elina Garança, Jakub Orlinski, Sabine Devieilhe, Pretty Yende and the Capuçon brothers — by organising their first solo recitals in France.

productions.title: Monet's Garden
productions.description: A 360-degree journey immersive art experience through the history and works of Claude Monet.
productions.long_description:
"A colourful installation and an intense sound landscape turn Monet's masterpieces into a grand spectacle of his work."  - Berliner Morgenpost

Monet’s Garden - The Immersive Experience opened in Stockholm in October 2023 following successful appearances in New York, Vienna and Hamburg. Due to popular demand it was extended until March 2024, and welcomed over 100,000 visitors during it’s Swedish run.

Monet’s Garden is an immersive art experience that give visitors a 360-degree journey through the history and works of one of the greatest artists of the past century, Claude Monet. 

This unique exhibition concept is staged with state-of-the-art multi-media technology, which allows visitors to immerse themselves completely inside the world of Claude Monet and some of his most famous artworks. Elaborate installations and projections, combined with a musical soundscape, create rushing worlds of colour and light making the paintings come alive in a way never seen before.

productions.title: Viva Frida Kahlo!
productions.description: A sensory journey through Frida's world and art.
productions.long_description:
VIVA FRIDA KAHLO is a unique staging of the world-famous works by legendary Mexican artist Frida Kahlo. After successful residencies in Zurich, Brussels, Munich, Berlin, Hamburg and Vienna, VIVA FRIDA KAHLO made its Scandinavian debut at Amiralen in Malmo in February and ran until June 2025.

VIVA FRIDA KAHLO takes visitors on a sensory journey through Frida’s world and art, by bringing her paintings to life using the latest technology to project onto walls up to 24 metres long and 5.5 metres high, as well as onto the floor of the exhibition hall. In addition, visitors can also enjoy a virtual reality experience that takes them inside some of the artists’ most famous and well-loved works, as they journey through the symbolism and dreams of Frida Kahlo, and becoming part of her world.

productions.title: CATS
productions.long_description:
Andrew Lloyd Webber’s record-breaking musical CATS headed to Opera de Monte-Carlo for a completely sold-out 2 week run in December 2025.

Adapted from TS Eliot’s ‘Old Possum’s Book of Practical Cats’, this "groundbreaking musical" (Daily Express) comes together in a sparkling fusion of music, dance and verse. On just one special night of the year, all Jellicle cats meet at the Jellicle Ball where Old Deuteronomy, their wise and benevolent leader, makes the Jellicle choice and announces which of them will go up to The Heaviside Layer and be reborn into a whole new Jellicle life. 

With "timeless music, spectacular sets and a superb cast" (Daily Mirror), breathtaking choreography and of course the unforgettable ‘Memory’, CATS is a magical musical like no other.

productions.title: Pretty Yende
productions.long_description:
South African soprano Pretty Yende was born in the small town of Piet Retief and has risen to the top of the opera world at an unprecedented speed. With her magnetic charm, her internationally acclaimed opera and solo performances, and a critically acclaimed discography, she has quickly become one of the brightest stars in the classical music world. 

Since her professional opera debut at the Latvian National Theatre in Riga as Micaela in Carmen, she has appeared at almost all of the world's major theatres, including the Royal Opera House, Covent Garden, the Opéra National de Paris, the Metropolitan Opera, the Teatro alla Scala in Milan, the Deutsche Oper Berlin, the Staatsoper Berlin, the Bavarian State Opera in Munich, the Zurich Opera House and the Gran Teatre del Liceu in Barcelona, the Vienna State Opera and many major concert venues. 

"A gracefulness that can seem decidedly divine seems to radiate from Ms. Yende." (New York Times)

productions.title: Phantom Of The Opera
productions.description: The legendary musical in Monte Carlo
productions.long_description:
The Opéra de Monte-Carlo presented a sold out, new staging of The Phantom of the Opera, co-produced with IDILI Live and Broadway Italia SRL, in December 2023. Since its opening in 1986, this record-breaking musical has played all over the world: to over 145 million people, in 183 cities, in 17 languages and has received over 70 major theatre awards, including seven Tonys and four Olivier Awards. 

Recognised throughout the world as one of the best Phantoms, Olivier and Tony nominee Ramin Karimloo took on the role of The Phantom in Monaco, having previously played the role in London’s West End, Korea and in the 25th Anniversary Concert at the Royal Albert Hall.

about.heading: A boutique studio with
about.body1: IDILI Live was founded in 2016 by Ingrid Sutej and Miguel Esteban, two of the live events industry's most respected figures. Between them, they bring over four decades of experience spanning almost every genre of entertainment imaginable.
about.body2: Ingrid has produced and promoted hit West End musicals and concert tours across Europe with world-renowned opera stars. Miguel co-founded the Verbier Festival and manages leading artists including soprano Anna Netrebko.
about.body3: Our team has extensive expertise across immersive theatre, classical music, exhibitions and large-scale musicals, always working with the same commitment to exceptional production values and unforgettable audience experiences.

team.name: Ingrid Sutej
team.bio: In three decades of experience of live event production, Ingrid Sutej has produced and promoted hit musicals in London and Europe, as well as concerts and tours by most of the top operatic stars and musicians of our generation. In London’s West End, Ingrid co-produced – during her tenure as CEO of U-Live – the highly successful productions of White Christmas in 2014 and Elf the Musical in 2015, both at the Dominion Theatre. Following this, in 2015/2016, Ingrid produced a ground-breaking tour to five major European opera houses of a season of the Salzburg Festival’s production of Norma starring Cecilia Bartoli. Since leaving Universal at the beginning of 2016, Ingrid has coproduced with Robert Mackintosh Rent the Musical on tour in the UK, including a two-month run at The Other Palace in London, and produced, with Björn Ulvaeus of ABBA, Mamma Mia! The Party both in London and Stockholm. She promotes concerts around Europe and the world with the world’s top opera singers, including Cecilia Bartoli, Angela Gheorghiu, Anna Netrebko and Rolando Villazón, among others. Prior to producing musicals, Ingrid’s association with AEG began as Director of Content Development for London’s The O2, where she created original shows for the venue’s first five years. She commissioned for the Arena: Ben Hur Live, Star Wars Live (and The Star Wars Exhibition), Romeo and Juliet in partnership with The Royal Ballet and Bizet’s Carmen, which were performed in the round, and on the end stage The Nutcracker with the Birmingham Royal Ballet, and a theatrical production of Carmina Burana. At Ingrid’s invitation, Cameron Mackintosh staged Les Misérables in Concert: The 25th Anniversary at The O2. Ingrid further initiated, on behalf of AEG, The O2 Arena version of Jesus Christ Superstar of 2012 and brought Robert Redford’s Sundance Festival to London as co-producer for The O2.

team.name: Miguel Esteban
team.bio: Miguel Esteban has diverse and international experience in the production and promotion of live events across various genres. He is Chief Operating Officer of Temple Live Entertainment (TLE). He is also the general manager of soprano Anna Netrebko since March 2022. Born in Los Angeles of Cuban heritage, he obtained his Bachelor’s Degree of Music (Vocal Arts) from the University of Southern California and his Teaching Diploma in Voice from the Conservatoire de Musique de Genève. Alongside Martin T:son Engstroem, he co-founded the Verbier Festival, with which he was associated from 1992 to 2005, as well as the Verbier Festival Orchestra. From 2001 to 2011, he was a Director for UBS Wealth Management in Switzerland, initially recruited to launch the bank’s Sports and Entertainment Group as a Senior Client Advisor. At the invitation of Ingrid Sutej, he moved to London to become Vice-President for Artists and Events at Universal Music’s live event subsidiary, U-Live, from 2012 to 2016. During that time, Miguel collaborated on seasonal productions of the musicals White Christmas (2014) and Elf (2015) at the Dominion Theatre in London. In 2016, he and Ingrid Sutej formed Idili Live, a global producer and promoter of all forms of live events, of which Miguel is the Chief Operating Officer. On behalf of Idili, Miguel helped co-produce the UK tour of Rent the Musical from 2016 to 2017. From 2016 to 2020, he was Associate Producer of the London and international productions of Mamma Mia! The Party, an immersive theatrical and dining experience launched by ABBA, as well as of ABBA: Super Troupers, the official international ABBA exhibition. On behalf of TLE, Miguel has been the Associate Producer of West End (2022 and 2023) and Broadway (2024) runs and annual USA tours (starting in 2025) of a new production of Elf the Musical. In collaboration with Martin Engstroem, he was Associate Artistic Director of the Riga Jurmala Music Festival from 2019 to 2022. Miguel is Executive Producer of the documentary Mariss Jansons: A Tale of Four Orchestras and co-producer and co-director of the documentary Anna Netrebko: A 30h Anniversary Tribute.
